description: Outcome-blind initial-frame probe at the pi0.5 semantic-subtask granularity.
prompt_template: Robot task: {task} At the current observation, choose the one next semantic subtask from these valid choices: {choices} Respond with exactly one choice.
candidates: move the black bowl to the plate
put the black bowl on the plate

interpretation.label_scope: The initial semantic subtask is pick up the bowl; lower-level approach/grasp phases are intentionally collapsed.
interpretation.primary_score: length-normalized conditional log probability over the finite candidate set
